svg.text: Identity, network perimeters, secrets, sensitivity, DLP · IT/Security review artifact

g.text: MFA enforced by tenant CA policy
DLP policies inherited by bot writes
Azure Tenant — Subscription: ATT-AARA-PROD (Region: East US 2)
Global anycast ingress · TLS 1.3 · OWASP managed ruleset · per-IP rate limits · geo-fence (US only) · bot protection
Hub VNet 10.0.0.0/16 · NSGs at every subnet · DDoS Standard
No public inbound (origin = Front Door only)
Egress to AskAT&T over Private Link
Secrets: AskAT&T credentials, Bot Framework keys
Vector index over digests for semantic recall
BGP routes to AskAT&T endpoint only
Backups & DR · Cosmos DB continuous backup (30-day PITR) · App Service slot swap · Key Vault HSM-backed · West US 3 paired region for DR
mTLS · client cert in Key Vault
Per-call audit log (prompt hash, model, latency)
No training on AT&T tenant data
No egress to public AI providers
COMPLIANCE & CONTROLS (mapped to NIST 800-53 R5 + AT&T enterprise standards)
